lg.l: While Manuscripts P, Y, and S are being transcribed, please use the LL text
(from https://www.thelatinlibrary.com/ovid/ovid.amor3.shtml).
N.B. View a sample transcription of Manuscript Y with Amores 3.7.
While Manuscripts P, Y, and S are being transcribed, please use the LL text
(from https://www.thelatinlibrary.com/ovid/ovid.amor3.shtml).
N.B. View a sample transcription of Manuscript Y with Amores 3.7.
